data.title: In January, consumer prices surged with an annual inflation rate of 2.8% as concerns over Iran added to price pressures.
data.description: Inflation, as measured by the Federal Reserve's preferred gauge, rose by 2.8 percent on an annual basis. Economists predict that there will be further price increases in the near future.

data.title: NYSE Content Update: Two-time Olympic Champions Have a Bell Moment on the Trading Floor
data.description: On March 13, 2026, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) issued a pre-market advisory straight from the trading floor, via PRNewswire. This update offers valuable market insights before the official trading day begins. Investors can access this daily update to stay informed about the latest trends and potential opportunities in the market. It is a beneficial resource for those looking to make informed investment decisions. Stay ahead of the curve with the NYSE pre-market update directly from the trading floor.

data.title: LifeBridge Announces Placement in AlchePharma Stores
data.description: A well-known natural health solutions brand is now available for purchase in Central California. This development was announced on March 13, 2026, by LifeBridge, a company based in Fort Lauderdale, Florida. The brand has been gaining traction in the North American health and wellness market after its introduction in mid-2025. This expansion signifies the brand's increasing presence in the region and highlights its growing popularity among consumers.

data.title: ANGEL TO DISTRIBUTE INDEPENDENT FILM SALT & HONEY, DIRECTED BY AMY REDFORD
data.description: The upcoming coming-of-age film features Anna Camp in the lead role and was penned by Skye Emerson. The story revolves around a young girl from a small mining town in Utah who navigates through a life-changing event. Set to be released on March 13, 2026, the film is produced by Angel (NYSE: ANGX), a media and technology firm with a substantial audience of 2.2 million.

data.title: Kontron’s KBox A‑151 EAI Now Powered by SiMa.ai Physical AI for 50+ TOPS Performance in Industrial Edge Applications
data.description: In San Diego, Kontron America revealed a partnership with SiMa.ai to introduce cutting-edge edge AI technology to industrial sectors via the KBox A-151 EAI platform. This collaboration aims to convert robust AI silicon into practical, durable industrial solutions. The KBox A-151 EAI is designed to support the SiMa.ai MLSoC™ Modalix accelerator, providing over 50 TOPS of dedicated AI performance.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Rises Ahead Of Fed Inflation Data; Adobe Dives On Earnings News (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase in anticipation of the release of the Federal Reserve's inflation gauge and GDP data. Adobe stock notably dropped following its earnings report. The day's stock market performance saw the Dow on the rise prior to the Fed's inflation data. Adobe's decline was attributed to its earnings news. This dynamic market movement was covered live on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise, Oil Prices Retreat; Dell, Micron Lead 7 Stocks To Watch
data.description: Major stock indexes experienced significant drops as oil prices reached their highest levels since 2022. Notable companies to keep an eye on include Dell and Micron. In related news, Dow Jones Futures have seen an uptick while oil prices have slightly decreased. This article also highlights seven stocks that investors should closely monitor.
